mapper.select: SELECT sfid FROM (WITH TO_CHECK (sfid) AS (VALUES ${ids}) SELECT tc.sfid, NOT EXISTS (SELECT sfid FROM faretablesync f WHERE f.sfid = tc.sfid) AS checked FROM to_check tc ) AS t WHERE t.checked = #{checked}

SELECT f.sfid, f.appcompany, f.pickupfare, f.firstsquaredistance, f.firstsquarefare, f.additionaldistance, f.additionalfare, f.latenightearlymorningextra, f.reservationfee, f.pickupfeeexistence, f.pickupfeedescription, f.bookingfeeexistence, f.bookingfeedescription, f.lastmodifieddate FROM faretable f WHERE(date_trunc('second', f.lastmodifieddate) >=${startTime}) ORDER BY f.sfid DESC OFFSET ${offset} LIMIT ${limit}

SELECT f.sfid, f.appcompany, f.pickupfare, f.firstsquaredistance, f.firstsquarefare, f.additionaldistance, f.additionalfare, f.latenightearlymorningextra, f.reservationfee, f.pickupfeeexistence, f.pickupfeedescription, f.bookingfeeexistence, f.bookingfeedescription FROM faretablesync f WHERE f.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY f.sfid DESC
SELECT count(f.sfid) AS rows FROM faretable f WHERE (date_trunc('second', f.lastmodifieddate) >= ${startTime})

SELECT f.sfid, f.appcompany, f.pickupfare, f.firstsquaredistance, f.firstsquarefare, f.additionaldistance, f.additionalfare, f.latenightearlymorningextra, f.reservationfee, f.pickupfeeexistence, f.pickupfeedescription, f.bookingfeeexistence, f.bookingfeedescription, f.lastmodifieddate FROM faretable f WHERE f.sfid=#{id}
SELECT f.sfid FROM faretable f WHERE f.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY f.sfid DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faretable (sfid, appcompany,pickupfare, firstsquaredistance, firstsquarefare, additionaldistance, additionalfare, latenightearlymorningextra, reservationfee, pickupfeeexistence, pickupfeedescription, bookingfeeexistence, bookingfeedescription, lastmodifieddate) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{appcompany}, #{pickupfare}, #{firstsquaredistance}, #{firstsquarefare}, #{additionaldistance}, #{additionalfare}, #{latenightearlymorningextra}, #{reservationfee}, ${pickupfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{pickupfeedescription}, ${bookingfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{bookingfeedescription}, #{lastmodifieddate})
mapper.update: UPDATE faretable SET appcompany=#{appcompany}, pickupfare=#{pickupfare}, firstsquaredistance=#{firstsquaredistance}, firstsquarefare=#{firstsquarefare}, additionaldistance=#{additionaldistance}, additionalfare=#{additionalfare}, latenightearlymorningextra=#{latenightearlymorningextra}, reservationfee=#{reservationfee}, pickupfeeexistence=${pickupfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, pickupfeedescription=#{pickupfeedescription}, bookingfeeexistence=${bookingfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, bookingfeedescription=#{bookingfeedescription}, lastmodifieddate=#{lastmodifieddate} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faretablesync (sfid, appcompany, pickupfare, firstsquaredistance, firstsquarefare, additionaldistance, additionalfare, latenightearlymorningextra, reservationfee, pickupfeeexistence, pickupfeedescription, bookingfeeexistence, bookingfeedescription, syncedtime) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{appcompany}, #{pickupfare}, #{firstsquaredistance}, #{firstsquarefare}, #{additionaldistance}, #{additionalfare}, #{latenightearlymorningextra}, #{reservationfee}, ${pickupfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{pickupfeedescription}, ${bookingfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, #{bookingfeedescription}, #{syncedtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE faretablesync SET appcompany=#{appcompany}, pickupfare=#{pickupfare}, firstsquaredistance=#{firstsquaredistance}, firstsquarefare=#{firstsquarefare}, additionaldistance=#{additionaldistance}, additionalfare=#{additionalfare}, latenightearlymorningextra=#{latenightearlymorningextra}, reservationfee=#{reservationfee}, pickupfeeexistence=${pickupfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, pickupfeedescription=#{pickupfeedescription}, bookingfeeexistence=${bookingfeeexistence==true?"'1'":"'0'"}, bookingfeedescription=#{bookingfeedescription}, syncedtime=#{syncedtime} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
